chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 384 of 2023 (Farhat Hussain Versus Mrs. Ghazala Arif and others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on CMA No. 4706/2023 2. For order on office objection/reply at A 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 4708/2023 (stay) Dated 16.02.2024 Mrs. Mahmooda Suleman and Muhammad Rizwan Advocates for the Appellants.-.-.-.-.-. Appellant’s counsel has filed an application under Order XXIII Rule 1 C.P.C. before us, supported by affidavit. The Application is taken on record Office to assign CMA number. Since it is an unconditional withdrawal the appeal is dismissed alongwith pending applications if any. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
